hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.tsx|*.ts|*.js|*.jsx) cd /c/Users/ADMIN/Desktop/ReactJS/aquarium-commerce && pnpm exec prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "[hook] formatted: $FILE" ;; esac'
